# webView(_:setToolbarsVisible:)

**Instance Method**

Sets whether a web view’s toolbars should be visible.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func webView(_ sender: WebView!, setToolbarsVisible visible: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The web view that sent the message.
- **visible**: If [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], all toolbars (with the exception of the status bar) are shown; otherwise, all toolbars (with the exception of the status bar) are removed.

## Discussion

No action is taken if you do not implement this method.

## Managing Toolbars and the Status Bar

- **webViewAreToolbarsVisible(_:)**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether any toolbars are visible in a web view’s window.
- **webViewIsStatusBarVisible(_:)**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the status bar in a web view’s window is visible.
- **webView(_:setStatusBarVisible:)**: Sets the visibility of the status bar in a web view’s window.
